title: Lattice Weyl Nodes Sum To Zero Net Chirality
summary: In a lattice system with isolated Weyl nodes, the total chirality over the Brillouin zone vanishes; positive and negative nodes must balance globally.
regime: Lattice band theory with isolated point nodes.
scope: Lecture One theorem-level statement for Weyl-node sets.

source_anchors.notes: The global sum of the node charges is zero.
The same cancellation is recovered from the Berry-curvature formulation.

representation: Global theorem-style statement about the node set.
failure_modes: A local continuum Weyl cone does not imply this claim by itself.
retrieval_hints: Use for queries about why net chirality cannot be nonzero on a lattice.
